MembershipId.description: The unique ID for the membership

TeamId.description: The unique ID of the team

PlayerId.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID stays with the player their entire career.

TeamName.description: The full name of the team

TeamArea.description: The area the team is located within their home country

Active.description: Whether the player's membership is active (true/false)

StartDate.description: The start date of the membership (in UTC)

EndDate.description: The end date of the membership (in UTC)

Updated.description: The timestamp of when the record was last updated (US Eastern Time)

Jersey.description: The player's jersey number on this team
